summary: Life Insurance Corporation of India announced its first bonus share issue in a 1:1 ratio, doubling its paid-up equity base. title: Wall St expects a cautious Fed as T-bill demand winds down
summary: Wall Street anticipates the Federal Reserve will adopt a gradual strategy for reducing its balance sheet expansion. The central bank began purchasing approximately $40 billion in short-term Treasuries monthly in December to alleviate funding market pressures. Officials suggest the pace of these purchases will be significantly reduced, moving cautiously to avoid missteps as the Fed aims for an end state.
